TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ashraf_Amaya, title = Ashraf_Amaya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashraf_Amaya} }

S.FORM: Ashraf Amaya sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Ashraf Amaya, biru na p'unro. qyanux nya pqwasan biru Ashraf Amaya mqwas biru beh Oak Park and River Forest High School.suruw lga musa beh Walther Lutheran gocyu pqwasan biru. Ashraf Amaya mzyu mari maki Southern Illinois hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)

Ashraf Amaya sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Ashraf Amaya, biru na p'unro. qyanux nya pqwasan biru Ashraf Amaya mqwas biru beh Oak Park and River Forest High School.suruw lga musa beh Walther Lutheran gocyu pqwasan biru. Ashraf Amaya mzyu mari maki Southern Illinois hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: as~ɕħra* amaja s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, as~ɕħra* amaja, βiru na pʔunro. qjanux nja pqwas~ɕan βiru as~ɕħra* amaja mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ oak park an* ri*er *ores~ɕt ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool.s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa βeħ waltħer lutħeran ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru. as~ɕħra* amaja mzju mari maki s~ɕoutħern illinois~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
